_comment: Agent Roster Manifest — the single machine-readable source of truth. JSON (not YAML) on purpose: Node parses it natively with zero dependencies, so a cheap model on a bare VM can never hit a YAML-parser gap. See manifest/SCHEMA.md for every field. One entry per agent. This spike ships ONE agent; the full roster (Pi PM/Marketing/CRO/Brand/Design/Sales/Software) is added the same way after the spike is approved.

agents.name: Spike
agents.role: Pi Coding Agent (spike): take one internal forge task from spec -> plan -> build -> validate, with one human checkpoint.

model._note: VERIFIED present in pi 0.78.0 via `pi --list-models haiku` (anthropic, 200K ctx, thinking). The adapter passes --model verbatim; this is the only place the id lives.

boundaries: never read shared/personal/ or any restricted/ folder
no client or Banafah work of any kind
AI branches end in -ai; pull before push; never force-push
credentials come only from the environment; never print or commit a secret
write only inside spike/workdir/pi-coding-spike/; do not modify other repos

checkpoints.question: Approve this PLAN to proceed to BUILD?
